name: Tangerine Peel Chicken
recipeInstructions:
------------------------SEASONING A------------------------
Combine salt, MSG, dark soy sauce, and Sam Shu wine. Mix well.
------------------------SEASONING B------------------------
Combine sugar, MSG (optional), dark soy sauce, light soy sauce,
Shao Hsing wine, black vinegar, and sesame oil. Mix well.
---------------------THICKENING SAUCE---------------------
Combine cornstarch and water. Mix well.
1. Wash chicken and cut into 2cm (3/4 inch) cubes. Mix thoroughly
with ginger and scallion, then add Seasoning A ingredients and marinate for 15 minutes.
2. Heat wok until smoking. Add oil and when very hot, deep fry the chicken pieces for 1 1/2 minutes,
until golden. Drain chicken pieces and discard most of the oil.
3. Reheat wok and stir-fry chillies and crumbled tangerine peel until they darken.
4. Add chicken pieces and stir.
5. Add Seasoning B and thickening sauce, then stir-fry until seasoning coats the chicken.
6. Serve.
